description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a long, rugged trench coat that reaches below the knees, paired with sturdy boots and fitted pants. The individual has a bald head and wears an eye patch over the right eye, giving a distinctive and recognizable appearance. His posture is relaxed yet confident, with one hand resting on his hip and the other hanging loosely by his side. The coat appears weathered, with visible creases and a slightly worn texture, suggesting frequent use. The figure's facial features are stern, and he is dressed in layered clothing suitable for urban or outdoor environments. The overall look is utilitarian and practical, with an emphasis on durability and function.
description: A bald adult male wearing a long trench coat, boots, and an eye patch, standing in a relaxed, confident pose. The clothing is rugged and practical, with a weathered appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the eye patch, facial features, and hand on hip, highlighting the confident stance and detailed coat front.
description_view_1: Left side view emphasizing the length of the coat, the profile of the head, and the relaxed arm position.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full back of the trench coat, the coat's texture, and the figure's stance.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the face, the coat's drape, and the sturdy boots.
attribute_clothing_type: long trench coat, fitted pants, scarf, and rugged boots with an eye patch accessory
attribute_posture: standing with one hand on hip and a relaxed stance
